title: Aureline internal RPC method manifest
description: Boundary schema for the method manifest produced by each service. The Rust registry in crates/aureline-rpc is the source of record; this file is the cross-tool export that pins the shape every service manifest is validated against and that the capability-negotiation handshake digests over. See docs/adr/0004-rpc-transport-and-schema-toolchain.md.

manifest_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for the manifest shape. Bumped only on breaking manifest changes.

service.description: Service identifier; the prefix used in every 'service.method' name under this manifest.

service_version.description: Semver service version. Independent from per-method contract versions; observability only.

digest.description: Content digest of the canonicalized manifest bytes (sha256, lowercase hex). The capability-negotiation handshake exchanges and pins this value.

methods.description: Ordered list of methods the service serves.

events.description: Ordered list of event kinds the service produces. Subscribers resolve 'kind' against this list.

scope_kind.description: Required scope for this method. 'workspace' means the request MUST carry a workspace id; 'global' means the literal 'global'; 'either' is reserved for diagnostics and echo methods.

status.description: 'active' is the currently served contract; 'deprecated' is served for the documented window; 'removed' remains in the manifest for audit only.

deprecated_at.description: Deprecation start date. Absent/null when status is 'active'.

remove_after.description: Earliest date on which the deprecation window may close. Absent/null when status is 'active'.

successor_version.description: Recommended successor version. Present when status is 'deprecated' or 'removed'.

kind.description: 'unary' returns one Ok or Err; 'server_stream' emits zero or more Progress frames and exactly one terminal frame; 'subscription' opens a long-lived subscription keyed by subscription_id and cancelled explicitly.

actor_classes.description: Actor classes allowed to invoke this method. Services reject other classes with a 'policy' error.

contract_versions.description: All contract versions the service advertises, active and deprecated.

required.description: When true, deadline_ns == 0 is rejected with a 'local' error. Unbounded subscriptions set this to false.

default_ns.description: Service-recommended default deadline in nanoseconds; callers that omit a deadline adopt it. Zero means 'no default'.

max_ns.description: Upper bound enforced by the service; requests with longer deadlines are clamped. Zero means 'no upper bound' and is only legal for subscriptions.

idempotency.description: 'required' means the service rejects the request without idempotency_key; 'recommended' for observable retries; 'not_applicable' for side-effect-free reads.

error_classes.description: Error classes the method is permitted to emit. The transport is free to also emit 'cancelled', 'deadline_exceeded', 'unavailable', and 'internal' regardless of this list.

documentation.description: Short human-readable description. Observability only; not normative.

kind.description: Payload kind id. Matches the event envelope's 'kind' field.

idempotency_key_required.description: Mirrors the envelope rule: at_least_once producers MUST carry idempotency_key. Defaults to true when delivery_mode is at_least_once; otherwise false.
